Instrumental & MIDI: https://ko-fi.com/s/7153994e26 Song performed by Teto Kasane (SynthV) "Webmaster" portrayed by Teto Kasane "Cursor" portrayed by ??? Composition: M.D., A.M. Please support them if you can! https://restorativland.org/ https://gifcities.org/   / oneterabyteofkilobyteage   -- I saw some guy on the docks Lookin’ for something he lost Which made me think of you When I took your WHATCHA-CALL-ITS-NAME I never gave it back What if I give it back today? It’s awkward to admit I never asked to borrow it So I didn’t say a thing When you thought you’d dropped it in the lake I meant to give it back I guess it slipped my mind until today When I was growing up I liked collecting stuff I think I’m past that now But I still can’t throw a thing away In plastic boxes, under beds and backs of closets’s where they stay All right! Among these many bins Not sure which one it’s in It’s gonna take a while But this has got to be the way So I’m gonna find it now So I can give it back today And this is how it went: I found my rubber ducks I found my Tonka trucks I found my bags of rocks I found my wind-up bots I found my Lincoln Logs I found my jumping frogs I found my novel socks I found my cuckoo clocks I found my resin bugs I found my landmark mugs I found my lanyards I even found those credit cards I found most everything but I couldn’t find your WHATCHA-CALL-ITS-NAME... I’ll find it, somehow That’s when I’ll call you up And it will all be just the same I know we’ll meet again We’ll meet again, but not today -- decoyman1200 …...more
